Planetary Onboard

Wye → Delta entry flow
LIVE Static HTMLFive phasesPasskey hooks
⬡ Launch Planetary Onboard ← Back to Hub
What Is It

Neuro-inclusive onboarding: Void → Anchor → Rooms → Dial → Pact. Wye → Delta entry flow is a core component of the P31 Labs sovereign cognitive infrastructure stack — built to run offline, deployed to the edge, and designed without dark patterns.

Ships as a single static file in `public/`. Pairs with `connect` and the journey page.

Core Features
  • Neuro-inclusive onboarding: Void → Anchor → Rooms → Dial → Pact
  • Same-origin styling as the hub (`/p31-style.css`)
  • Optional WebAuthn / Worker-backed passkey in production (see `workers/passkey`)
How To Use
1Start at `/planetary-onboard.html` or from the home banner
2Complete the phases; use mesh and dome when you are ready to go deeper
Architecture Notes
Ships as a single static file in `public/`. Pairs with `connect` and the journey page.
